2:
Energy deficit, which points to very weak Vital Energy. People who possess weak energy, or have none at all, tend to be lazy in their work and studies, feeling a constant sluggishness and fatigue, or, on the contrary, display excessive physical restlessness and fussiness. Their endurance is reduced. It is quite difficult for them to unlock their potential and abilities because of their own laziness. They usually set their goals too low.
Sometimes, on the contrary, they deliberately draw attention to themselves (recharging their energy from it), and may appear overly sociable and open. But this openness and sociability is only apparent; in reality such people are very closed off inside, letting almost no one into their inner world, because they are extremely vulnerable. A single word can wound them and undermine their self-esteem.
Sometimes they struggle to express strong emotions (laughter, tears).
People with an energy deficit love to put things off until later and are unable to concentrate on a single task.
A distinctive trait of theirs is the inability to set priorities properly in time; they sense time poorly and either procrastinate (getting absorbed in their phone, TV, and so on) or begin to bustle about frantically, yet their productivity still remains low because they grab at everything at once. This is precisely why the key recommendation for those in deficit is skilful time planning, but planning done wisely, with respect for one's own pace. They should not set themselves an impossible number of tasks; slow but steady is better. BUT PLANNING IS ABSOLUTELY ESSENTIAL FOR SUCH PEOPLE!
There is a risk of painful love, when a person with an energy deficit falls for and literally becomes hooked (as if on a drug) on someone with more charged energy.
Because of their weak energy, such people have a small protective energy shield, and they literally soak up other people's negative energy like a sponge, so they are advised to avoid toxic people, because a large build-up of someone else's negative energy can make them feel even more shattered and drained, and they may even fall ill.
Such a child may often deliberately seek attention (this is how they recharge).
With 0/2 there are energy vampires with a weak level of energy who dislike quarrelling. As a rule, they try not to get involved in a conflict, but love very much to be a witness to it; in general they are closed and withdrawn, preferring to listen rather than to speak. They have little endurance, want a lot of rest, are prone to haste, scattering their efforts and getting distracted.
Getting a dog is a good idea. A dog is an excellent donor for an energy deficit. They love going shopping and visiting others. This is how they recharge their energy. Such people need to work in a large team in order to be energized. People like this should wear pink and red clothing all their lives. Recommendations: non-injury-prone sports (yoga, Pilates, stretching, swimming), time planning, avoiding energy vampires and toxic people.
22:
This is the norm that every person needs. This is good energy, the most favourable for connecting with people and for work. Such people are sociable and make contact with others easily. However, a coefficient like this is not that of a donor. In any case, those with such an indicator need to spend their energy economically. People with normal energy are not inclined to laziness; if a person begins to grow lazy or to fall ill, then look for the causes not in the energy realm (low self-esteem, an unloved job, a toxic environment, or other reasons). It is not worth testing the patience of a person with good energy, because if need be they can rise to a conflict. They are easy-going and quick to act. They are characterized by persistence, capacity for work, and a desire to communicate long and much.
They are emotional, express their emotions well, have a feel for the times and popular trends (they are contemporary), and know how to concentrate on their tasks.
222:
This is good energy, the most favourable for connecting with people and for work. Such people are sociable and make contact with others easily. This person is a donor by their very structure, and they need to organize their life so as to spend their energy as productively as possible. Their oratorical gift and communicability are strongly developed; such a person can heal with words.
People who have this energy are good storytellers, lecturers, and orators; by their energy they are healers, able to work with large numbers of people, able to perform for an audience and hold its attention.
People with good energy are not inclined to laziness; if a person begins to grow lazy or to fall ill, then look for the causes not in the energy realm (low self-esteem, an unloved job, a toxic environment, or other reasons). The same applies to illness: such a person is not prone to sickness, and if they do fall ill, the causes should be sought in psychosomatics and external circumstances. They are easy-going and quick to act. They are characterized by persistence, capacity for work, and a desire to communicate long and much. The energy of these people is charged to the positive. They are sociable and communicative; such people need to work in a team, to work and interact with people. Women with this level of energy should not stay home for long; theirs is the energy of a psychic, and they can sense people on an energetic level. They are emotional, express their emotions well, have a feel for the times and popular trends (they are contemporary), and know how to concentrate on their tasks. They are energy donors who charge others with their conversation, their energy, and their presence. There is one small peculiarity. This coefficient is not stable, so at times such a person wants to withdraw, to talk to no one and do nothing; at times withdrawnness may arise, an unwillingness to share their problems, an outburst of emotion under pressure from outside — this is normal, this is their peculiarity, this is how they recharge. Such states can arise after prolonged physical exertion, travel, or a great deal of socializing. These people absolutely must be given the chance to be alone and recharge, otherwise they become aggressive and confrontational.
These people sense others perfectly; they are empaths.
They are psychics. They possess powerful intuition and instinct. They sense people on an energetic level.
Recommendations: accept your peculiarity. Take up active sports (gym workouts, running, Zumba).
2222:
Energy surplus. A donor — a person who has an excess of energy. There truly is a great deal of energy; the person is distinguished by mobility, and one can safely call them quick. They are incredibly enduring, hardworking, and persistent, able to see what they have begun through to the end (especially in the presence of 88 and more). They have a good feel for time and can manage to get through an enormous number of tasks. They are very sociable and attractive to those around them, since they charge others with their energy.
A problem arises with how to spend the available energy correctly. Sometimes an excessive calm may appear, bordering on indifference to everything. Such people need to spin their energy up: the more they are loaded with tasks, the more they accomplish, and conversely, if such a person comes to a stop, it is then hard for them to get going again. There is a good saying: "Slow to harness, but quick to ride."
Such people absolutely must lead an active lifestyle in order to unload this sector, to spend the energy they have, and not allow it to accumulate. For accumulated energy literally poisons one from within, makes a person confrontational, and creates a field of conflict around them.
People with good energy are not inclined to laziness; if a person begins to grow lazy or to fall ill, then look for the causes not in the energy realm (low self-esteem, an unloved job, a toxic environment, or other reasons). The same applies to illness: such a person is not prone to sickness, and if they do fall ill, the causes should be sought in psychosomatics and external circumstances.
They absolutely must do sports (even professionally), socialize a great deal, and lead an active life, otherwise the person becomes confrontational.
These people sense others perfectly; they are empaths. They possess powerful intuition and instinct. They are vivid, magnetic, and charismatic. They need to organize their life so as to spend their energy to the fullest and most productively.
With "2222 and more" one can heal. Such people may also spend their energy on watching all sorts of TV programmes, YouTube, and Instagram, doing nothing for their own development — this too can be called laziness, but laziness from a surplus of energy. Getting a cat is a good idea: cats take energy away, which is just the thing for someone with a surplus.
Correcting karma: working with the energy of death — the ritual of sacrifice, work; sport — learning to release one's energy (sport, creativity, trips to the mountains to scream it all out, and so on).
Recommendations: sport is obligatory, plenty of socializing, an active lifestyle. There is a great deal of energy, which intensifies the character. A fiery, emotional temper is characteristic of such people (more often women).
22222:
Hyper-energy. In a state of affect they do not control themselves. In some respects vindictive and dangerous people. They go bald early and have darting eyes. They are donor people. They speak quickly and think quickly.
222 222 and more — sent to Earth from other planets for an energetic shake-up and breakthroughs.
222222:
Hyper-energy. In a state of affect they do not control themselves. In some respects vindictive and dangerous people. They go bald early and have darting eyes. They are donor people. They speak quickly and think quickly.
222 222 and more — sent to Earth from other planets for an energetic shake-up and breakthroughs.
